market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
articles.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

articles.title: Upheaval at the Ethereum Foundation has some of crypto’s biggest names feeling bullish
articles.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at Ethereum's eventful week that started off with the launch of EthLabs, plus the layoffs at the Ethereum Foundation, and what this all means for the network.

articles.title: Kalshi targets a massive $40 billion valuation, widening lead over rival Polymarket
articles.description: The prediction market operator, which is eyeing a potential public debut in 2027, could close a new funding round in Q3, according to a Financial Times report.

articles.title: Kalshi sues Illinois officials over prediction markets restrictions
articles.description: The prediction markets company claimed that it would be “irreparably harmed” when an Illinois law signed as part of a budget package goes in effect on July 1.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Crypto-backed candidates notch wins in three US state primaries
articles.description: The crypto-aligned Fairshake PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $8 million on media to support candidates in Maryland, New York and Utah amid pushback from many criticizing “crypto billionaires.”

articles.title: Binance withdraws Greek MiCA bid but vows to remain in Europe
articles.description: The crypto giant must find a home base in the EU by July 1 or regulators will force the company to shut down operations for millions of regional users.

articles.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
articles.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

articles.title: Deezer says its new feature lets fans remix songs with artist consent
articles.description: Global music streaming service Deezer is taking a contrarian approach to AI, even as it adds a feature that lets fans remix songs.

articles.title: Bitcoin falls under $60K, but traders anticipate 15% bounce
articles.description: Bitcoin price dropped below $60,000 for the first time in weeks, but data shows traders betting on a relief bounce.

articles.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
articles.description: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

articles.title: NTSB launches probe into fatal Texas Tesla crash
articles.description: The safety board, known for its thorough investigations, is probing the crash alongside the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

articles.title: Bitcoin crash to $60K opens new $530M demand zone: Will bulls buy in?
articles.description: A $525 million Bitcoin buy wall intersects with a major liquidation zone, creating a key battleground between $60,500 and $65,000.

articles.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
articles.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

articles.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000 as AI trade continues to draw investor interest and capital
articles.description: South Korean memory chip giant on Wednesday filed to raise nearly $30 billion in a U.S. offering.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: Infrastructure is the prevailing currency in digital assets
articles.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Nonco’s Caue Teixeira makes the case that regardless of which coin ultimately wins, infrastructure is the prevailing currency in digital assets. Then, using CoinDesk's liquidation feed, Liquibit Capital's Alen Pavlović finds that June's forced selling peaked near

articles.title: Credit unions managing $25B in assets join stablecoin infrastructure program
articles.description: A new pilot from Stablecore, Circuit and Curql gives participating US credit unions access to test stablecoin payments and other digital asset services.

articles.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application
articles.description: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

articles.title: SecondFi loses $2.4 million in Cardano wallet exploit
articles.description: SecondFi was hit by three separate attacks exploiting a flaw in its wallet generation software. A further 129 million ADA was secured by the team before attackers could reach it.

articles.title: Trump's refusal to sign housing bill could delay Congress and imperil Clarity Act
articles.description: As Congress prepared to celebrate the president's signing of the bipartisan housing bill that contains a CBDC prohibition, Trump abruptly cancelled the event.
